questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in indirect speech.
He said, “Two and two make four.”

options.text: He says that two and two make four.
He said that two and two make four.
He says that two and two make four.
He said that two and two made four.

questions.correct_option_text: He said that two and two make four.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in active voice.
The award was presented to her by the director.

options.text: She presented the award to the director.
The award presented to her by the director.
The director presented the award to her.
She was presenting the award to the director.

questions.correct_option_text: The director presented the award to her.

questions.question_text_full:
Read the given sentence carefully and fill in the blank by selecting the correct synonym of the word given in the brackets.
The authority refused to pay any heed to the ________ demands made by the workers. (Trivial)
